What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt and denim shorts sits on a dark wooden bench containing shoe cubbies. She walks towards white double glass doors and opens one to exit outside. Later, she stands behind a light-colored wooden workbench in a workshop with plywood walls. Text overlays display lumber dimensions and tools including a drill and miter saw.

Describe the sequence of actions the woman performs from the start of the video until she is introduced in the workshop.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the woman in a white top sits on the bench to adjust her footwear; at 2s, she walks from right to left across the frame; at 6s, she opens the white-framed glass door to the outside; at 10s, she stands behind a wooden workbench in the workshop setting.

canonical_answer: She marks the wood with a pen and cuts it with a miter saw.
